In 2021, 11,578 people reported falling victim to real estate fraud, to the tune of $350,328,166, which the agency (vaguely) states is a 64% increase. Apartment Guide analyzed Better Business Bureau data from 2015-2021, and found that San Francisco had the third-highest number of per capita scams, behind LA and Boise (SF expats be warned).", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "craigslist: san francisco jobs, apartments, for sale, services, community, and events", "url": "https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sfc/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] craigslist provides local classifieds and forums for jobs, housing, for sale, services, local community, and events", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "Fake Craigslist apartment posts? : r/sanfrancisco", "url": "https://www.reddit.com/r/sanfrancisco/comments/1k18mhq/fake_craigslist_apartment_posts/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] Title:  URL Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/sanfrancisco/comments/1k18mhq/fake_craigslist_apartment_posts/ Warning: Target URL returned error 403: Forbidden Markdown Content: You've been blocked by network security. A flood of cheap furnished rooms with mid-century-ish nightstands imply a rush of Airbnb Lords quitting the STR game. But most of all, I see scams. By my unscientific count, 16 out of 120 listings on the first page of shared rooms on Craigslist San Francisco looked fraudulent.", "relevance_score": 0.5}, {"title": "craigslist: SF bay area jobs, apartments, for sale, services, community, and events", "url": "https://sfbay.craigslist.org/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] Title: craigslist: SF bay area jobs, apartments, for sale, services, community, and events URL Source: https://sfbay.craigslist.org/ Markdown Content: [CL](https://www.craigslist.org/about/sites) *   [SF bay area](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/) *   [post](https://post.craigslist.org/c/sfo) *   [account](https://accounts.craigslist.org/login/home) [CL](https://www.craigslist.org/about/sites) SF bay area *   [sfc](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sfc/ \"san francisco\") *   [sby](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sby/ \"south bay\") *   [eby](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/ \"east bay\") *   [pen](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/pen/ \"peninsula\") *   [nby](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/nby/ \"north bay\") *   [scz](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/scz/ \"santa cruz\") ##
